$comment: Migrations run inside Vercel's build using the DATABASE_URL the Neon integration already injects — the Vercel↔Neon integration itself never executes SQL, and the GitHub Actions path needs a separately-maintained secret that has proven error-prone. db/migrate.js is idempotent (tracks applied files in _migrations), so running on every build is safe; a failing migration fails the build, so a deploy can never outrun its schema. The guard keeps builds working when no DATABASE_URL is present.
buildCommand: if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then npm run db:migrate; fi && npm run build
